title: Minimum Window Subsequence
hints: Start by finding the first valid window ending at each position in s. How can you efficiently track where the last character of t was matched?
Use two pointers or a sliding window approach. Once you find a valid window, try shrinking it from the left to see if it remains valid.
A window is valid if it contains t as a subsequence. When shrinking from the left, you only need to check if the removed character was essential for the current subsequence match.
